title: awesomely vulkanized
description: this uses the vulkan mod to get better fps.
body:
this uses the vulkan mod to get better fps. how? vulkan is the base but i have added other mods that work with it. altogether, this is probably one of the best performance mods.

### **why use this against other competitors?**

the modpack is probably more lightweight and has better performance

### are you for sure this will give better fps than sodium?

sodium still uses a modified version openGL to optomize the game. vulkan, hence the name, replaces openGL with vulkan renderer, which is way more performant, so yes i am highly positive it will work better as long your device was made in 2017 or later.

overall i just wanted more fps and i did it. have fun with this and even add mods if you wanna. there are QOL mods so if you think one ahould be added jin the discord and make a suggestion!
